statement: In every magma, Equation 701 (`x = y * (x * ((z * w) * w))`) implies Equation 2035 (`x = ((x * x) * x) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0749
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z w) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op x x) x) (op x x))
